box-braids-longues.label: Box braids longues
box-braids-longues.prompt: Apply neat long box braids with defined sections, elegant salon finish, realistic braid texture.

box-braids-courtes.label: Box braids courtes
box-braids-courtes.prompt: Apply short box braids with clean sections and a polished salon result.

knotless-braids.label: Knotless braids
knotless-braids.prompt: Apply natural looking knotless braids with a refined luxury salon finish.

fulani-braids.label: Fulani braids
fulani-braids.prompt: Apply Fulani braids with face-framing braids, a precise center structure, and tasteful detail.

cornrows-simples.label: Cornrows simples
cornrows-simples.prompt: Apply straight back cornrows that are neat, symmetrical, and photorealistic.

vanille-twist.label: Vanille / Twist
vanille-twist.prompt: Apply defined two-strand twists with realistic texture, volume, and a salon-quality finish.

locks-starter.label: Starter locks
locks-starter.prompt: Apply clean starter locks with realistic parting and a soft natural finish.

tissage-volume.label: Tissage volume
tissage-volume.prompt: Apply a voluminous weave hairstyle with soft movement, natural blending, and a premium beauty editorial feel.

extensions-lisses.label: Extensions lisses
extensions-lisses.prompt: Apply sleek blended hair extensions with smooth shine and realistic salon styling.

brushing-lisse.label: Brushing lisse
brushing-lisse.prompt: Apply a polished straight blowout hairstyle with smooth shine, soft movement, realistic salon finish.
